short_summary: Beirut strikes continue, no new escalation
rationale: No qualitatively new events affect Poland this cycle — Beirut strikes continue as background, and no energy, security, or EU developments cross the threshold. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Israel expands military control by 1,000 sq km
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli operations in Lebanon and Gaza continue without new escalation affecting Poland directly. Energy market volatility remains a minor indirect concern.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump rhetoric on Iran deal and Beirut strikes continues — no signed agreement or confirmed policy change. Indirect energy price risk for Poland remains low.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A significant bilateral trade deal between UK and Japan — minimal direct impact on Poland's daily life or EU economy.
